title: Pesan dalam Derit Lantai
theme: Menemukan bahwa petualangan bisa muncul dari penemuan tak terduga di lingkungan rumah sendiri, mengubah rutinitas menjadi eksplorasi yang penuh rasa ingin tahu.

cover.prompt: Minimalist interior of a quiet studio apartment. A simple wooden desk with a laptop and a mug, positioned under gentle, diffused daylight from a window. The focus is on the clean lines and understated objects, conveying a sense of daily routine. A subtle, anonymous human form is suggested in the mid-ground, perhaps partially visible as a soft shape, standing near a section of a parquet wooden floor. The composition uses the rule of thirds to highlight the quiet ambiance and thoughtful atmosphere. Soft, muted color tones throughout.
cover.style: Minimalist composition, strong silhouettes, gentle lighting

meta.plan_summary: An architect tired of WFH discovers a loose floorboard in his minimalist apartment. This leads him to a hidden box containing old notes and a broken compass left by a previous resident. He attempts to decipher the cryptic clues, feeling like an amateur detective exploring his own home. He eventually finds a secret panel revealing a single letter and a key-shaped locket, realizing the true treasure is the philosophy that adventure and discovery can be found in the mundane and closest surroundings, connecting him to the past.
